name: cryptoweather
description: AI-powered Bitcoin & Ethereum prediction signals and technical market details from CryptoWeather
author: CryptoWeather Team

remote.note: Run with PORT env var set to serve Streamable HTTP at /mcp (e.g. on PlayMCP in KC). Without PORT, runs as stdio.

tools.name: get_crypto_signal
tools.description: 크립토웨더(CryptoWeather) AI의 현재 암호화폐 가격 예측 시그널(날씨)을 조회합니다
tools.returns: Current signal with clarity, position, and profit information

tools.name: get_bitcoin_signal
tools.description: 크립토웨더(CryptoWeather) AI의 현재 비트코인(Bitcoin) 가격 예측 시그널을 조회합니다
tools.returns: Current Bitcoin signal with clarity, position, and profit information

tools.name: get_ethereum_signal
tools.description: 크립토웨더(CryptoWeather) AI의 현재 이더리움(Ethereum) 가격 예측 시그널을 조회합니다
tools.returns: Current Ethereum signal with clarity, position, and profit information

tools.name: get_trading_recommendation
tools.description: 크립토웨더(CryptoWeather)의 현재 시그널을 바탕으로 상세 트레이딩 추천 정보를 제공합니다
tools.returns: Detailed trading advice with buy/sell/hold recommendations

tools.name: get_performance_metrics
tools.description: 크립토웨더(CryptoWeather) AI의 성과 지표와 통계(백테스트, 수익률, 신뢰도)를 조회합니다
tools.returns: Historical performance data, backtest results, and profit metrics

tools.name: get_market_detail
tools.description: 크립토웨더(CryptoWeather) 1시간봉 시장 데이터 기반의 시장 상세 정보와 기술적 지표를 조회합니다: OHLCV, 24시간 변동/거래량, EMA 9/21/50, RSI(14), Stochastic(14,3,3), MACD(12,26,9)
tools.returns: Full technical snapshot of the current market

tools.name: get_ohlcv
tools.description: 크립토웨더(CryptoWeather)에서 최근 1시간봉 OHLCV 캔들(시가, 고가, 저가, 종가, 거래량)을 조회합니다

tools.name: get_indicator
tools.description: 크립토웨더(CryptoWeather) 1시간봉 시장 데이터에서 단일 기술적 지표 또는 가격 필드를 조회합니다 (open/high/low/close/volume/rsi/stochastic/ema/macd)
tools.returns: Latest value(s) of the requested indicator with interpretation

tools.name: get_signal_history
tools.description: 크립토웨더(CryptoWeather) 시그널의 업데이트 주기와 해석 방법(방법론)에 대한 안내를 제공합니다
tools.returns: Information about signal types, update frequency, and interpretation guide

debug.description: Enable debug mode for detailed logging

network.description: Required to fetch signals and market data from CryptoWeather API

disclaimer: CryptoWeather predictions are for informational purposes only. This is not financial advice. Always do your own research and consider your risk tolerance before making trading decisions.
